preset_description: Dark = decision signal. Emphasis accumulates toward conversion — trust anchors and commitment moments are dark, top-of-funnel is light.

accent_tokens._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.

beats.name: Orientation
beats.rationale: Establishes immediate context for trial users at the decision stage — reaffirms what the product does and signals that this page is specifically for them as they evaluate whether to commit to a paid plan.

beats.name: Value
beats.rationale: Reminds trial users of the core capabilities and outcomes they've already experienced or explored, reinforcing what they stand to retain (or lose) by not converting. Validators need a clear value framework before they'll accept proof.

beats.name: Credibility
beats.rationale: Validators demand third-party validation before committing. Customer logos, testimonials, and trust signals from recognizable peers reduce perceived risk and satisfy their need for external confirmation at the decision stage.

beats.name: Evidence
beats.rationale: Required for the decision funnel stage and critical for the Validator archetype. Concrete metrics, case study data, and quantified outcomes provide the hard proof Validators use to rationalize their purchase decision internally and to stakeholders.

beats.name: Decision
beats.rationale: Required at the decision funnel stage. Presents pricing, plan comparison, and clear choice framing so trial users can evaluate the exact commitment. Positioned after Evidence so proof anchors the perceived value before price is revealed.

beats.name: Conversion
beats.rationale: Must appear immediately before Recovery. Delivers the primary CTA — upgrade prompt, commitment action — at the moment the Validator has been fully equipped with proof, value context, and pricing clarity to act.

beats.name: Recovery
beats.rationale: Always last. Provides secondary paths for trial users not yet ready — contact sales, extend trial, compare plans again — ensuring no potential conversion is lost and giving Validators a safe fallback that keeps them in the funnel.

page.reasoning: minimal variant for conversion-focused pages — strip nav_links, keep logo and single CTA only. The persistent CTA in nav is the most converted element on most SaaS pages — critical for decision-stage conversion goal.
Validator variant always includes trust_signal. with-social-proof variant places LogoStrip immediately below CTACluster, establishing credibility at the page opening for trial-to-paid conversion.
Validator benefits from specific, outcome-oriented descriptions — not feature names, benefit statements. 3-col-icon is the default for structured capability articulation.

slots.headline: What you keep when you upgrade
slots.subhead: Every capability below stays in your codebase, configured once, running permanently — no recurring cost, no vendor dependency.

features.title: Semantic resolution engine
features.description: Components resolve the right behavior across archetype, funnel stage, intent state, and context mode — automatically. No conditional logic to write, no manual variant QA.

features.title: IA planner agent
features.description: Go from a one-line brief to a full page architecture in seconds. Powered by Claude Opus via your own Anthropic API key — you own the token spend entirely.

features.title: Multi-variant generation
features.description: One brief produces Mover, Validator, and Explorer variants in parallel. Ship the right message to the right audience without tripling your production time.

features.title: Palette map
features.description: Visual emphasis resolves per component per funnel stage without a single manual assignment. Conversion-oriented hierarchy is built into the system, not the designer's judgment call.

features.title: Component manifest
features.description: 11 components fully specified with zone affinity, slot schemas, and usage intent. The intelligence layer is already mapped — extend it to your stack as you grow.

features.title: Full ownership, zero lock-in
features.description: MODE lives in your codebase. No runtime dependency, no usage-based billing, no vendor dashboard to outlive. Fork it, modify it, make it infrastructure you control.

page.reasoning: Always include role and company for Validator credibility. with-photo increases engagement and perceived authenticity. Primary trust signal for Validator archetype at decision stage.

slots.quote: We were producing three to five variant sets per campaign manually — different copy density, different CTA weight, different visual hierarchy for each audience segment. MODE collapsed that into a single brief and a resolved output. The IA planner alone saved us roughly six hours per launch cycle. That's not an estimate — we tracked it across eight releases.

page.reasoning: Always pair stats with source attribution in Validator contexts — unsourced stats reduce trust. 3-stat is the preferred default for establishing scale and momentum.

stats.label: Median time from install to first resolved output
Variant coverage from a single brief — Mover, Validator, Explorer in parallel
Ongoing subscription fees, runtime dependencies, or vendor billing cycles

page.reasoning: Validator variant includes description and longer feature list. highlighted variant for recommended plan drives conversion decision at critical funnel stage.

slots.description: The complete semantic intent layer for your design system. Resolution engine, component manifest, palette map, IA planner, multi-variant generation, and Next.js preview UI. Yours permanently — no subscription, no lock-in.
features: Three palette presets — funnel, archetype, feature-emphasis
Token dashboard with editable palette map
Lifetime access — no subscription, no renewal

page.reasoning: Validator variant: include subhead and trust_signal (e.g., 'No credit card required'). Centered layout with trust signals reinforces conversion commitment for trial-to-paid decision.

slots.headline: Still evaluating? That's a reasonable place to be.
slots.subhead: If you have specific questions about fit, implementation, or team licensing, reach out directly. We'll give you a straight answer, not a sales sequence.
slots.trust_signal: One-time payment. No subscription. Cancel-free by design.

page.reasoning: with-cta variant recaptures departing users on key conversion pages — use on pricing and signup flows. Essential for decision-stage recovery.
